steps.t: Ithurga wants you to collect debts from residents holding back their tithes. He directed you to scout the town for Methen, Akubis, Dagan, and Yigo to …
You collected the four debts. Return to Ithurga at his abode in lower Halrax.
Ithurga directed you to purchase a bag of coins that matter to him from the vault-keeper in Halrax. The vault is in the upper ward of the township. Re…
